markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Breyta and fwd.digital for content creation and SEO growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Breyta has developed an AI-powered research assistant that can process various data types and generate insights with evidence-backed answers](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers programmatic content creation, SEO optimization, and link-building services that could complement Breyta's product](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Both companies see potential in leveraging AI for content creation while maintaining human oversight for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in exploring innovative approaches to content strategy, including embedding chatbots and creating searchable knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

## Topics

### Breyta's Product and Approach

  - [AI-powered research assistant that processes various data types (podcasts, videos, articles, PDFs)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Generates insights with evidence-backed answers, bypassing context window limitations](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Used DeepGram as a core part of the project](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Planning to launch a generally available product in mid-January](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Exploring innovative content strategies, such as live transcribing conference talks and creating searchable repositories](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### fwd.digital's Offerings and Process

  - [Programmatic content creation with human editing for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base creation and API integration capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Templatized content structures for efficient scaling (e.g., drug comparisons for prehems)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Multi-step content creation process including research, draft generation, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Achieved significant keyword growth for clients (e.g., 2,000 to 8,000 keywords in a short period)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### SEO and Growth Strategies

  - [Importance of backlink building, especially for newer domains](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [AI outbound campaigns for link building (30% reply rates for some clients)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Potential for creative link-building strategies leveraging Breyta's product (e.g., creating chatbots for influencers/podcasts and getting backlinks)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Recommendation to start with programmatic content creation and augment with link building for faster results](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

### Collaboration Potential

  - [fwd.digital could help optimize Breyta's content for SEO and assist with link building](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Breyta's AI-powered research assistant could be integrated into fwd.digital's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Potential for innovative content strategies combining both companies' strengths (e.g., searchable knowledge bases with optimized landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording and Slack Connect invite to Chris](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [fwd.digital to share a sample SOW (Statement of Work) for Chris to review](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Chris to discuss potential collaboration with his co-founder and make a decision within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [If interested in moving forward, schedule a kickoff meeting (noting fwd.digital's limited availability of 2 kickoffs per week)](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Continue communication via Slack for any follow-up questions or clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/8Krm2L9ZbHqUZLpsA9sNv2bj4Pzzfu_q?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
